pi_items.source: setup_task.sh SQL injection script creates/updates campaign 'AMD_OPTIM', which is checked by verifier.py and export_result.sh
task.json instructions explicitly demand setting routing extension to 8369, verified by verifier.py reading result from export_result.sh
task.json instructions specify 8320, verified by verifier.py reading result from export_result.sh
task.json instructions specify 3500, verified by verifier.py reading result from export_result.sh
task.json instructions specify 2000, verified by verifier.py reading result from export_result.sh
task.json instructions specify 4000, verified by verifier.py reading result from export_result.sh

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated data injected via an SQL script (setup_task.sh) that explicitly creates or updates the 'AMD_OPTIM' campaign. The target configuration values—Routing Extension 8369, Send to VM Extension 8320, Initial Silence 3500, Word Length 2000, and Max Greeting 4000—are prescribed directly in the task prompt and systematically validated by verifier.py.
